# Hey There, I'm Drago 👋

<img align="right" width="300" src="https://camo.githubusercontent." />

I'm Drago a graphics designer and a programmer. I like building clean, modern, minimal apps and some games.

## These days I'm focused on:
* learning javascript
* building electron apps
* simple tools

<br clear="right"/>

---

## Some stuff I built:
* <a href="https://github.com/lorddrago12/BASIC-Programming-Language">Basic Programming Language</a> - A simple interpreted programming language made using python.
* <a href="https://github.com/lorddrago12/DrawMate">Draw Mate</a> - A drawing app made using html, css and javascript.
* <a href="https://github.com/lorddrago12/Pomodoro-Timer">Pomodoro Timer</a> - A pomodoro timer app made using the electron framework which has a 25 min timer.
* <a href="https://github.com/lorddrago12/Calendar-App">Calendar App</a> - A calendar app made using the electron framework which shows the today's date and month.
* <a href="https://github.com/lorddrago12/Website-Blocker-Extension">Website Blocker Chrome Extension</a> - A chrome extension that blocks website you put the url of and you can remove them anytime you want.

---

## Fun Facts:
* I like playing chess
* I dont like listening to music when working because it helps me focus.
